description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Appears to be from Natan b. Shemuel to [Abū l-Ḥa]san b. Rabbenu Shemuel. Mentions the capitation tax several times. Mentions al-Maḥalla, but this is crossed out, with Sumbāṭ (=Sunbāṭ) written above. Then mentions the term גנדאריה, possibly a place of settlement (Golb, Topography, 131). Another word is crossed out with "al-Jazīra" written above it. Refers to an expectation that an amīr would protect [...]. Mentions [...] b. al-Mesos al-Parnas
description_he: מכתב בערבית-יהודית. נראה כי נשלח על ידי נתן בן שמואל. מוזכר מס הגולגולת מספר פעמים וכן אל-מחלה (מחוק, הוחלף בסונבאט). מתייחס לציפייה שאמיר יעניק הגנה.
